title: ASR Outdoor Telescopic BBQ Fork 2 Prong Outdoor Cooking Utensil - 3 Pack
description:
Cook for your family and friends any time with the ASR Outdoor Telescoping BBQ Fork 3 Pack! This Telescoping BBQ Fork is a great addition to any kitchen or BBQ utensil set. It features 2 prongs for skewering meat, veggies and just about anything else you want to grill. Each fork extends to 35.5", making it the perfect length for keeping you away from the heat. You can even use it to toast s'mores! The fork will collapse down to just 11" for easy storage, and is constructed of durable stainless steel. The rubber dipped black handles provide added comfort, and each prong comes with a safety cover for when not in use. Make sure to grab one of these before your next cook out!
